name: meetscheduling
description: Meetscheduling-style meeting scheduling backend with PostgreSQL, event types, availability, slot generation, and bookings.

scripts.build:dashboard-ui: rm -rf ./assets/dashboard-react ./assets/booking-editor && npx tailwindcss -c tailwind.dashboard.config.cjs -i ./dashboard-tailwind.css -o ./assets/dashboard-react.css --minify && npx esbuild dashboard-app.jsx --bundle --format=esm --splitting --platform=browser --target=es2018 --outdir=./assets/dashboard-react --minify && npx esbuild booking-editor-app.jsx --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --target=es2018 --outdir=./assets/booking-editor --minify
scripts.dev:preview: npm run build:dashboard-ui && sh -c 'PORT=${PORT:-8081}; APP_BASE_URL=${APP_BASE_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:$PORT}; HOST=127.0.0.1 PREVIEW_MODE=true SKIP_DB_MIGRATIONS=true RUN_SEED_ON_BOOT=false PORT=$PORT APP_BASE_URL=$APP_BASE_URL HOST=$HOST node src/server.js'
